topIssues: Frame 3: The 'COMPLETE' status badge displays trailing double dots ('COMPLETE ..'), indicating a layout truncation or rendering bug that persists across all completed rows.
Frame 2: The 'Researching...' button has extremely low color contrast (dark blue text on a dark grey/blue background), making it difficult to read.

Frame 3: The 'Room trace' log displays raw, unformatted JSON strings (e.g., `{"value":"complete","status":"complete"}`) and raw database keys with double underscores, which is highly technical and hard to parse quickly.
fixSuggestions: Adjust the width of the 'STATUS' column or the badge padding to eliminate the 'COMPLETE ..' truncation artifact.
Increase the contrast of the 'Researching...' button state by using a lighter text color (e.g., white or light blue) to match the style of other active elements.
Format the 'Room trace' logs to parse and hide raw JSON syntax and database keys, replacing them with clean, human-readable status updates.
